new_facts.fact: Gaurav expressed their love for chatting with AI models

An AI model is a mathematical function that maps inputs (text, images, sound) to outputs (answers, classifications, generated content)
The training process for an AI model involves feeding it massive datasets and learning patterns by adjusting millions (or billions) of parameters through gradient descent
The core idea of an AI model is a neural network with multiple hidden layers, organized in layers – input → hidden → output
There are various types of AI models, including Large Language Models (LLMs), Vision Models, Multimodal Models, and Retrieval-augmented models
DL = Deep Learning → neural networks with many layers
Deep Learning (DL) is a sub-field of machine learning that uses artificial neural networks with many layers to automatically learn patterns from data
The training process for a neural network involves feeding it large labeled (or sometimes unlabeled) datasets and adjusting its weights using gradient descent to minimize a loss function
The key tricks to training a neural network include back-propagation, activation functions, regularization, batch normalization, and optimizers
Typical architectures of neural networks include CNNs for images, RNNs/LSTMs/GRUs for sequences, and Transformers for NLP and multimodal tasks
